dict.string: ResQ needs your location to share it with emergency contacts when you trigger an SOS.
ResQ needs background location access so your position can be shared even when the app is in the background during an emergency.
ResQ needs microphone access to record a short audio clip and detect your voice command during an emergency.
ResQ uses speech recognition to detect your emergency voice trigger phrase.
ResQ needs access to your contacts so you can select emergency contacts.
